packs.name: Cross-Industry Core
packs.description: Generic business capability starting point covering the functions every organization runs. Use as-is for diversified organizations or alongside an industry pack.
packs.attribution: Hand-authored from public industry-standard capability vocabulary

tree.name: Enterprise Management
tree.description: Direction-setting and oversight of the organization.

children.name: Strategy & Planning
children.description: Corporate strategy definition, business planning, and target setting.

children.name: Enterprise Performance Management
children.description: KPIs, scorecards, and tracking against strategic goals.

children.name: Portfolio & Project Management
children.description: Investment portfolio, program, and project delivery.

children.name: Governance, Risk & Compliance
children.description: Policies, controls, risk oversight, and regulatory compliance.

children.name: Risk Management
children.description: Identification, assessment, and mitigation of enterprise risks.

children.name: Internal Audit & Controls
children.description: Audit planning, execution, and controls management.

children.name: Legal Management
children.description: Contract lifecycle, legal matters, and intellectual property.

children.name: Corporate Communications
children.description: Internal and external communications and public relations.

tree.name: Finance
tree.description: Managing the organization's money and financial truth.

children.name: General Ledger Accounting
children.description: Chart of accounts, journals, and period-end close.

children.name: Accounts Payable
children.description: Supplier invoice processing and payment runs.

children.name: Accounts Receivable
children.description: Customer invoicing, collections, and cash application.

children.name: Treasury & Cash Management
children.description: Liquidity, funding, hedging, and bank relationships.

tree.name: Human Resources
tree.description: Attracting, developing, and administering the workforce.

children.name: HR Administration
children.description: Employee records, organizational structure, and HR compliance.

children.name: Talent & Learning
children.description: Performance, career development, succession, and training.

children.name: Workforce Planning & Time
children.description: Headcount planning, scheduling, time and absence.

tree.name: Customer & Revenue
tree.description: Winning, serving, and growing customers.

children.name: Campaign Management
children.description: Planning, executing, and measuring marketing campaigns.

children.name: Customer Data & Insights
children.description: Customer master data, segmentation, and analytics.

children.name: Order & Contract Management
children.description: Quotes, sales orders, and customer contracts.

children.name: Pricing & Quotation
children.description: Price setting, discounting, and quote generation.

children.name: Customer Service
children.description: Inquiries, complaints, warranty, and self-service support.

children.name: Commerce Channels
children.description: Web, store, and omnichannel selling experiences.

tree.name: Operations & Supply Chain
tree.description: Making and moving the product or service.

children.name: Supply Chain Planning
children.description: Demand forecasting, supply planning, and S&OP.

children.name: Sourcing & Contracts
children.description: RFx, supplier selection, and procurement contracts.

children.name: Production & Service Operations
children.description: Producing goods or delivering the core service, with quality management.

children.name: Asset & Maintenance Management
children.description: Physical asset lifecycle, maintenance, and reliability.

tree.name: Product & Service Development
tree.description: Deciding and designing what to offer.

children.name: Product Portfolio Management
children.description: Portfolio strategy, roadmaps, and lifecycle decisions.

children.name: Product Compliance & Data
children.description: Product master data, specifications, and compliance.

tree.name: Information Technology
tree.description: Running and evolving the technology estate.

children.name: IT Strategy & Architecture
children.description: IT strategy, enterprise architecture, and portfolio governance.

children.name: IT Operations & Infrastructure
children.description: Compute, network, end-user services, and service management.

children.name: Cybersecurity & Data Protection
children.description: Security operations, identity and access, and data privacy.

children.name: Data & Analytics
children.description: Data platforms, governance, reporting, and advanced analytics.

children.name: Product Configuration & Pricing
children.description: Deposit product terms, rates, and fees.

children.name: Payment Fraud Monitoring

children.name: Trading & Execution
children.description: Market trading and client order execution.

children.description: Incident, control, and operational risk management.

tree.name: Wealth & Investment Management

children.name: Advisory & Financial Planning
children.description: Client goals, financial plans, and suitability.
